options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -cell
options.description: {{tieCellList1} {tieCellList2} ...} Set tie cell lists for setTieHiLoMode command

options.name: -createHierPort
options.description: Add tie-cells in different hierarchy than tie-off pins when possible

options.name: -honorDontTouch
options.description: honor dont_touch attribute on nets, insts, cells and modules

options.name: -maxDistance
options.description: distance between tie-cell and tie-pins should be less than given value

options.name: -maxFanout
options.description: the number of tie-pins a tie-net can drive. A '0' means no-limit

options.name: -modulePrevention
options.description: add tie cell for module instantiation port

options.name: -reportHierPort
options.description: Report created ports when createHierPort is set
